item.title: Trump border czar leaves door open to ICE deployment in other sanctuary cities as feds leave Minneapolis

item.title: Trump blasts Newsom’s UK pact, warns foreign leaders as 2028 buzz builds
item.description: Trump slams California Gov. Newsom's European diplomacy tour as "inappropriate," warning UK leaders against partnering with the Democratic governor.

item.title: Obama calls Los Angeles homelessness an ‘atrocity,’ criticizes 'losing' political strategy

item.title: Sharia law victim who fled Somalia issues endorsement in critical Senate race
